visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The scene opens in a brightly lit warehouse-style supermarket (Costco). A woman with a grey bucket hat and a purple off-shoulder top is excitedly holding two large transparent bags of taro. She smiles broadly, gesturing with the bags towards the camera. The background shows industrial shelving units and boxes of produce. (2) The camera transitions to a domestic setting, likely an indoor living room or dining area. The same woman is seated at a table, holding a small, peeled taro root. A red plate filled with whole, unpeeled taro roots sits in front of her. She demonstrates dipping the taro into a small bowl of sugar and then into a bowl of pepper, displaying a joyful expression as she tastes and describes the food. The background includes a brown leather couch and a child's colorful play mat.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 妹妹弄給我吃. (2) [Variety]: 小朋友最愛 健康又美味. (3) [Variety]: 好市多 最新出的小香芋. (4) [Subtitle]: 一公斤189元. (5) [Subtitle]: 很便宜欸. (6) [Subtitle]: 而且你看你這個小芋頭. (7) [Subtitle]: 芋頭番薯加一點鹽吧. (8) [Variety]: 就交給你了. (9) [Subtitle]: 這個電鍋蒸一蒸交給你了. (10) [Subtitle]: 哎你都知道怎麼做了. [Variety]: 自己用. (11) [Subtitle]: 我負責吃. (12) [Subtitle]: 你都知道怎麼做. (13) [Subtitle]: 很棒耶. (14) [Subtitle]: 這樣一整袋看起來很漂亮. (15) [Subtitle]: 而且是玉美的美. (16) [Subtitle]: 回去試試值得值得. (17) [Subtitle]: 喜歡小香芋的朋友們不要錯過了. (18) [Subtitle]: 這一次出的小香芋. (19) [Subtitle]: 我們覺得. [Variety]: 味道非常的好. (20) [Subtitle]: 它的味道是像檳榔芋一樣. [Variety]: 非常的清香. (21) [Subtitle]: 然後口感很綿密. (22) [Subtitle]: 我們自己沾胡椒鹽當早餐吃也很好吃. (23) [Subtitle]: 那沾上白糖的話. (24) [Subtitle]: 就是直接當成甜點那樣子. (25) [Subtitle]: 它本身的那個小香芋是沒有甜味的. (26) [Subtitle]: 但是它有完整的. [Variety]: 芋頭香氣. (27) [Subtitle]: 而且它的口感很像芋泥. (28) [Subtitle]: 所以沾了白糖嚼在嘴裡. (29) [Subtitle]: 真的在吃芋泥那種感覺. (30) [Subtitle]: 然後很有口感. (31) [Subtitle]: 很好吃.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 1 male passer-by in the warehouse background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A woman with dark hair wearing a grey bucket hat, a purple ruffled off-shoulder blouse, and a black skirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The first location is a Costco warehouse with high metal shelving, price tags, and cardboard boxes. The second location is a home interior with a table, various bowls, a red Le Creuset plate, a brown couch, and children's toys in the background.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched, enthusiastic female voice begins narrating at a rapid pace over an upbeat electronic pop background track. The music features a prominent 4/4 beat and bright synth melodies. A subtle rustling of plastic bags is audible as the speaker moves items. (2) A sharp 'ding' sound effect triggers as the speaker highlights the price. The vocal tone remains consistently high in arousal and positive in valence. (3) The scene shifts, and the sound of a ceramic plate lightly clinking against a table is heard. The female voice continues with high clarity, describing the texture of the food. (4) Small 'pop' and 'bubble' sound effects are interspersed with the dialogue during the tasting segment, punctuating her reactions. The BGM remains steady in volume and tempo throughout, providing a high-energy bed for the voice-over.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a product recommendation and food review for a new taro product found at Costco. It combines an initial 'shopping find' excitement with a practical home cooking and tasting demonstration to persuade viewers of the product's value and versatility.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of the product package and Costco signage, combined with verbal praise and pricing information.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses typical social media editing styles, including high-density text overlays and energetic vocal delivery to maintain viewer engagement.
